channel.title: Posts on Kfkq
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Kfkq

item.title: It's all about dynamics
item.description: Abstract : Phenomena as we perceive it are dynamics in essence.

item.title: Collection of Useful Terms
item.description: Abstract : Definition, or explanation of many terms that I find useful.

item.title: Dystopian Display of the Rafah Massacre
item.description: Abstract: I have never witnessed dystopia at this level before. The Western consumerist dystopia, with its demonic government, is enjoying the Super Bowl game while Israel airs propaganda ads amidst massacres in Rafah-Gaza, a refugee settlement of 2 million.

item.title: File-over-app Digital Philosophy
item.description: Abstract : I move beyond digital apps when it comes notes taking and journaling, why? Because controlling raw resources file is important. File over app is a philosophy where you get to control all file with formats that easy to read over long period of time, no matter how developed technology is. My aim is to create a digital artifact on my works.

item.title: The Importance of Theory of Knowledge
item.description: Abstract : I express the importance of theory of knowledge (epistemology) as acquisition and justification of belief systems. This essay emphasizes the significance of epistemology as a foundational tool for understanding the limitations of knowledge, and how to navigate the abundance of information and knowledge in the modern world. Epistemological inquiry is path of humility, yet path to the truth.
